---
title: "Data Wrangling"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}

# reset global environment ----
rm(list = ls())

# import packages ----
library(dplyr)
library(data.table)
library(lubridate)
library(ellmer)
library(sentimentr)

# TODO: include fuzzy matching with agrap package

```

```{r us-data-import}

# import pennsylvania geonames ----
pennsylvaniaGeoNames <- readRDS(file = "./Data/PennsylvaniaGeoNames.rds")

# import us geonames (source data too large for github) ----
# pennsylvaniaGeoNames <- read.delim("./Data/US/US.txt", header = FALSE) |>
#   stats::setNames(
#     nm = c(
#       "Geonameid", "Name", "Asciiname", "AlternateNames",
#       "Latitude", "Longitude",
#       "FeatureClass", "FeatureCode",
#       "CountryCode", "CC2",
#       "Admin1Code", "Admin2Code", "Admin3Code", "Admin4Code",
#       "Population", "Elevation", "Dem", "Timezone",
#       "ModificationDate"
#     )
#   ) |>
#   dplyr::filter(CountryCode == "US", Admin1Code == "PA") |>
#   dplyr::select(-c(CC2, Admin4Code, Dem, Timezone, ModificationDate))

```

```{r pa-data-import}

# import tabula table for pennsylvania house redistricting comments ----
tabulaPAHouse <- read.csv(file = "./Data/TabulaPAHouse.csv") |>
  dplyr::select(-X) |>
  dplyr::rename(CommunityName = "Community.Name") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Description = paste0(CommunityName, ": ", Description),
    Date = lubridate::dmy(x = Date)
  )

```

```{r initialize-chat}

# initialize chat object ----
chat <- ellmer::chat_openai() # model gpt-4.1

```

```{r gather-comment-data}

# compile comment data ----
commentData <- purrr::map2(
  .x = as.character(tabulaPAHouse$Date[1:5]),
  .y = tabulaPAHouse$Description[1:5],
  .f = \(date, description) {
    
    ## gather individual comment data and mentioned locations ----
    chatOutput <- chat$chat_structured(
      description,
      type = ellmer::type_object(
        
        ### comment sentiment ----
        commentSentiment = ellmer::type_number(
          description = paste0(
            "Positive/Negative sentiment of this Pennsylvania commenter's description ",
            "of a community of interest scaled from 0 to 1. ",
            "A score of 0 indicates completely negative emotional sentiment, ",
            "while a score of 1 indicates completely positive emotional sentiment."
          )
        ),
        
        ### comment clarity ----
        commentClarity = ellmer::type_number(
          description = paste(
            "Clarity of this Pennsylvania commenter's description",
            "of a community of interest scaled from 0 to 1.",
            "Clarity should be based on how specific the commenter's mentioned",
            "locations are and how clearly they state their desire to include or",
            "exclude those locations from a community of interest.",
            "A score of 0 indicates no clarity,",
            "while a score of 1 indicates complete clarity."
          )
        ),
    
        ### locations included in the community of interest ----
        LocationsIncluded = ellmer::type_array(
          items = ellmer::type_string(),
          description = paste(
            "List of all locations that this Pennsylvania commenter mentions",
            "should be kept together in their community of interest.",
            "Should be exclusive and brief. "
          )
        ),
    
        ## locations excluded from the community of interest ----
        LocationsExcluded = ellmer::type_array(
          items = ellmer::type_string(),
          description = paste(
            "List of all locations that this Pennsylvania commenter mentions",
            "should be kept separate from their community of interest.",
            "Should be exclusive and brief. "
          )
        ),
        
        ## counties included in the community of interest ----
        ## TODO: improve fips code matching
        countiesIncluded = ellmer::type_array(
          items = ellmer::type_number(),
          description = paste(
            "Two or Three digit FIPS codes of all the counties in which this",
            "Pennsylvania commenter's mentioned locations might be contained."
          )
        )
      )
    )
    
    ## compile information for an individual comment ----
    commentInformation <- list(
      Date = date,
      OriginalComment = description,
      Characters = nchar(description),
      Sentiment = chatOutput$commentSentiment,
      Clarity = chatOutput$commentClarity,
      LocationsIncluded = chatOutput$LocationsIncluded,
      LocationsExcluded = chatOutput$LocationsExcluded,
      CountiesIncluded = chatOutput$countiesIncluded
    )
    
    ## return comment information ----
    return(commentInformation)
  }
)

```

```{r match-geonames}

# compile comment data ----
commentData <- commentData |> 
  purrr::map(
    .f = \(comment) {
      
      ## filter geonames matches to mentioned counties ----
      regionalGeoNames <- pennsylvaniaGeoNames |>
        dplyr::filter(Admin2Code %in% comment$CountiesIncluded)
      print(paste(nrow(regionalGeoNames), "possible GeoNames matches found"))
      
      ## register names filtering tool ----
      chat$register_tool(
        tool = ellmer::tool(
          name = "gather_geonames",
          description = "Gathers Pennsylvania GeoNames locations for possible matches",
          fun = \() return(regionalGeoNames$Name)
        )
      )
      
      ## add geonames matches included in community of interest ----
      Sys.sleep(time = 20)
      comment[["GeoNamesIncluded"]] <- chat$chat(
        paste(
          "Which GeoNames locations in Pennsylvania match these specific locations:",
          paste(comment$LocationsIncluded, collapse = ", "), "?",
          "Trim the response to a comma-separated location vector",
          "If no matches can be found, respond 'NA'"
        )
      ) |> as.character()
      
      ## add geonames matches excluded from community of interest ----
      Sys.sleep(time = 20)
      comment[["GeoNamesExcluded"]] <- chat$chat(
        paste(
          "Which GeoNames locations in Pennsylvania match these specific locations:",
          paste(comment$LocationsExcluded, collapse = ", "), "?",
          "Trim the response to a comma-separated location vector.",
          "If no matches can be found, respond 'NA'"
        )
      ) |> as.character()
      
      # return comment with added fields ----
      return(comment)
    }
  )

```
